Dialog.name: MSG_716_1_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 213 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 1 1 213}This isn't where I belong... I've known that from the start![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_716_1_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 2 0 3}Chidori! What the hell's gotten into you!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_716_2_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 213 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 3 1 213}Takaya was right... You're all just a nuisance![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_716_3_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 213 5 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 4 1 213}This pain... It's nothing compared to the suffering I'm feeling inside![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_716_4_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 213 5 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 6 1 213}I don't know... I don't know anymore... Junpei...[n]{f 1 1}
